def classify_candidates(rows: list[dict[str, str]]) -> tuple[list[dict[str, str]], list[dict[str, str]], list[dict[str, str]]]:
    buy_rows = [row for row in rows if str(row.get("action") or "").upper() == "BUY"]
    sell_rows = [row for row in rows if str(row.get("action") or "").upper() == "SELL"]
    tech_rows = [
        row
        for row in buy_rows
        if "smallcap_chip_v4_2" in str(row.get("strategy_id") or "")
    ]
    guard_rows = [
        row
        for row in buy_rows
        if "smallcap_chip_v4_2b" in str(row.get("strategy_id") or "")
    ]
    tech_rows = sorted(tech_rows, key=lambda row: -to_float(row.get("score")))
    guard_rows = sorted(guard_rows, key=lambda row: -to_float(row.get("score")))
    sell_rows = sorted(sell_rows, key=lambda row: -to_float(row.get("score")))
    return tech_rows, guard_rows, sell_rows


def merged_signal_rows(path: Path | None) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
    rows = load_csv_rows(path)
    converted: list[dict[str, str]] = []
    for row in rows:
        action = str(row.get("action") or row.get("signal_type") or "").strip().upper()
        if not action:
            continue
        converted.append(
            {
                "trade_date": str(row.get("trade_date") or ""),
                "ts_code": str(row.get("ts_code") or ""),
                "action": action,
                "score": str(row.get("score") or ""),
                "strategy_id": str(row.get("strategy_id") or ""),
                "approved": "False",
                "ai_stock_name": str(row.get("ai_stock_name") or ""),
                "ai_operation_advice": str(row.get("ai_operation_advice") or "候选观察"),
                "ai_decision": str(row.get("ai_decision") or "observe"),
                "risk_status": str(row.get("risk_flag") or row.get("risk_status") or "normal"),
            }
        )
    return converted


def execution_pass_rows(rows: list[dict[str, str]]) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
    passed = [
        row
        for row in rows
        if str(row.get("approved") or "").strip().lower() == "true"
        and str(row.get("ai_decision") or "").strip().lower() != "block"
    ]
    return passed if passed else rows

def _manual_source_candidates() -> list[tuple[Path, str, str]]:
    dated_web = sorted(
        [p for p in QUANT_REPORTS.glob("ths_web_selected_holdings_*.csv") if "latest" not in p.name],
        key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime,
        reverse=True,
    )
    dated_xlsx = sorted(
        QUANT_REPORTS.glob("real_holdings_from_feishu_xlsx_*.csv"),
        key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime,
        reverse=True,
    )
    candidates: list[tuple[Path, str, str]] = []
    ordered = [
        (QUANT_REPORTS / "ths_web_selected_holdings_latest.csv", "web_selected_latest", "web"),
        *[(p, "web_selected_dated", "web") for p in dated_web],
        *[(p, "feishu_xlsx_manual", "manual") for p in dated_xlsx],
        (QUANT_CONFIG / "portfolio_positions_manual.csv", "portfolio_positions_manual", "manual"),
    ]
    seen: set[Path] = set()
    for path, reason, source_type in ordered:
        if not path.exists():
            continue
        resolved = path.resolve()
        if resolved in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(resolved)
        candidates.append((path, reason, source_type))
    return candidates
